title: dizygotheca parvifolia
intro: Dizygotheca parvifolia, also known as the 'False Daisy', is a tropical evergreen shrub native to the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dizygotheca parvifolia include treating fever, sore throats, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from its leaves, which can be used to soothe and calm various health issues.
